steps.title: Find the authors' similarity
steps.content: The notes show that Jean Toomer wrote Cane and Herman Melville wrote Billy Budd, Sailor. Both works recently entered the public domain, so that is the shared trait to emphasize.

steps.title: Avoid contrast and single-author focus
steps.content: Choice A uses unlike and highlights a difference. Choice B includes both works but shifts to a novel-versus-novella contrast. Choice C discusses only Melville. The sentence that names both authors and the shared public-domain event fits the goal. The answer is D.
